{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process lsass.exe modified the 'F' key within the HKLM\\SAM\\SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users\\000003E9 registry path. While lsass.exe manages authentication, direct modification of this key, which contains sensitive user data including password hashes, is highly suspicious and often indicative of credential dumping or manipulation.",
  "indicators": [
    "lsass.exe",
    "SAM database",
    "credential dumping",
    "registry modification",
    "HKLM\\SAM\\SAM\\Domains\\Account\\Users\\000003E9\\F"
  ]
}
